description.initial: You emerge from the caves onto a steep mountain slope. The terrain here is treacherous, loose rock and narrow ledges requiring careful navigation. Above, the peaks disappear into clouds. Below, a vast valley opens up, eventually giving way to distant blue that might be ocean. The caves continue deeper into the mountain to the west.
description.return: The mountain slope. The view remains breathtaking despite the treacherous footing.
description.atmospheric: Wind whips at your clothes. Small stones skitter downward with each step you take.

east.blockedMessage: The slope becomes too steep and unstable to traverse. You cannot go this way.

items.itemMessage: You kneel beside a thin stream running down the rock face and drink. The water is cold and sharp, straight from the mountain.

interactables.name: Wild Goats
interactables.examineText: A small herd of mountain goats picks its way across the impossible terrain with ease. They pause to watch you, unafraid.

interactables.name: Cave Mouth
interactables.examineText: The cave entrance you emerged from yawns dark against the grey stone. Faint crystal light glows from within.
